2026-04-13T06:26:29.9508001Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9510898Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9516001Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9516739Z 
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9517234Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9522674Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9523683Z 
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9523997Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9524858Z 
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9525744Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9526195Z 
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9526456Z   git switch -
2026-04-13T06:26:29.9526765Z
